measurement_note: Size is the team count T while the voter count V is held fixed at 624. Each tier repeats every cyclic rotation equally, so every team has an identical count at every rank and alphabetical order decides the result. The reference counts O(VT) ballot positions and sorts precomputed vectors. A correct slower bubble sort recounts every tied positional column during every team comparison, adding repeated factors of T; it completes all legal 4/12/26-team tiers.
